# ToolFocus — Free Developer & Productivity Tools
> https://toolfocus.app

ToolFocus provides free, browser-based tools for developers, writers, and SEO professionals. All tools run entirely client-side — no data ever leaves your device, no account required.

## Tools Available

- **JSON Formatter** — Format, validate, and minify JSON data instantly
- **Password Generator** — Create strong, secure passwords with custom rules
- **Word Counter** — Count words, characters, sentences, and reading time
- **Base64 Encoder/Decoder** — Encode and decode Base64 strings
- **URL Encoder/Decoder** — Encode and decode URL components
- **Meta Tag Generator** — Generate SEO and Open Graph meta tags
- **Case Converter** — Convert text between camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, and more
- **Markdown Editor** — Live preview markdown with export options
- **CSS Minifier** — Minify and beautify CSS code
- **HTML Minifier** — Compress HTML for production
- **Color Picker** — Pick colors and convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL
- **QR Code Generator** — Generate QR codes from any URL or text
- **JWT Decoder** — Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens
- **Regex Tester** — Test and debug regular expressions in real-time
- And 20+ more free tools

## Blog & Guides

In-depth guides on developer tools, SEO, and web development best practices.
